title: After the Satsuki Sho: Next Time for Sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Victory escapes Matikanetannhauser. Mihono
Bourbon, who was also aiming to be Triple Crown
champion, has her dreams shattered as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the Classic Triple Crown tour isn't over yet.
Next up is the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We slurp down some ramen and refocus our
energy on the upcoming Japanese Derby!
